data.name: Snowball Christmas festival
data.detailed_description:
Snowball Christmas festival is a puzzle game, the ultimate goal of which is to swap the blocks to collect the image.
But remember, the purpose of this game is to let you relax and enjoy the process.
To do this, we added a minimalistic interface and relaxing music.

Features:
- Beautiful CG art (more 50+).
- Interesting Puzzle levels.
- Nice music.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 10 64bit, Windows® 8.1 64bit, Windows® 7 SP1 64bit
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ i5-3550
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 560
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
